title: Bauhaus Primary
summary: Bauhaus geometric idiom: primary red/yellow/blue on bright off-white with pure black 3px borders. 5-dock rail of colored geometric chips opens five dedicated swap panes.
flow: Left rail of 5 colored geometric chips (red square, yellow triangle, blue circle, black bar, red dot) opens five dedicated swap panes; black slab capsule; primary-color flag corner widget; library is a grid of primary-color blocks.
